source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9
distilled_thesis: The tranquil eye without envy names the steady condition needed to bless overflowing without resentment or grasping.
